---
title: Introduction to R for data treatment and plotting
summary : A short introduction to the R language and its application to data treatment for physico-chemists
tags : ["R"]
external_link: "/r_course/about-the-class.html"
author : Colin Bousige
date   : 2017-10-27T19:56:21+02:00
---

This is a short introduction to the R language and its application to data treatment for physico-chemists.

> Go [here](/r_course/about-the-class.html)
